title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Local Government Unit of Los Baños with National Food Authority (NFA) for the Purchase of Rice to Be Used During Emergency Situations for Relief Distribution / Stockpiling / Prepositioning As Part of the Town?s Disaster Preparedness and Other Needs of Their Various Projects and Activities and Ratifying the Same Thereafter.
